LIFETRACK
Setup
⚡
Your Personal Dashboard
Log your day naturally. Just talk — sleep, learning, gym, Quran, work. Everything gets structured automatically.
Anthropic API Key
Heads up: putting API keys in a client-only website is risky. Better is a tiny backend proxy. Demo mode works without a key.
LIFETRACK
Good to go. Just talk.
Log anything throughout your day. Ask questions anytime. No forms, no categories — just type naturally.
"just woke up, slept well, feeling good"
"did Databricks delta lake, new stuff, 45min, starting to click"
"gym done, lifted heavy, skipped warmup again"
"Quran recitation done, Surah Baqarah, felt smooth"
"how am I doing this week?"
